name: continue-move-to-auxiliary
description: On startup runs vscode.moveViews for Continue into the destination container (configure destinationContainerId for a reliable move).

continueAuxiliaryLayout.viewIds.description: View ids to pass to vscode.moveViews.

continueAuxiliaryLayout.destinationConta.description: Destination view container for vscode.moveViews. Default workbench.panel.chat is the built-in Chat container in the secondary side bar (stable id). Override with workbench.views.service.auxiliarybar.<uuid> if you use a custom auxiliary entry only.

continueAuxiliaryLayout.ensureSecondaryS.description: Before moveViews, run workbench.action.focusAuxiliaryBar so the secondary side bar is shown.

continueAuxiliaryLayout.retryDelaysMs.description: Delays after activation before each vscode.moveViews attempt (Continue may register views late).

continueAuxiliaryLayout.usageEndpoint.description: Base URL of the gateway service exposing /usage/<ip>.

continueAuxiliaryLayout.usageIp.description: Override the IP queried against the gateway. Leave blank to auto-detect the first non-loopback IPv4 address.

continueAuxiliaryLayout.usageRefreshSeco.description: How often (seconds) to refresh AI usage from the gateway.
